response.justification: Maria is an accomplished full-stack engineer with 16+ years of experience and demonstrated software craftsmanship excellence. However, this role requires strong C++ expertise and industrial automation domain knowledge. Her professional background is primarily JavaScript/TypeScript and web systems, with only 6 months of documented C++ experience at National Instruments. She lacks expertise in industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443), embedded systems, and industrial protocols (MQTT, Modbus TCP/IP). The skill and domain gaps are too substantial for a senior-level immediate hire.
strengths: 16+ years of progressive software engineering across multiple domains and technologies
Proven commitment to software craftsmanship, TDD practices, and mentoring (created testing frameworks and workshops)
Full-stack capabilities with demonstrated ability to rapidly learn new technologies and work in complex architectures
concerns: Only 6 months of professional C++ experience; primary expertise is JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and web systems
No background in industrial automation, embedded systems, or cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443, SDL)
Limited demonstrated experience with multi-threaded C++ programming, networking protocols (MQTT, Modbus), or low-latency systems

key_factors.factor: Industrial domain and cybersecurity knowledge missing
